name: B.A.T.M.A.N.-adv
encryption: None at the protocol layer (rely on Wi-Fi WPA or upper layers)
summary: Layer-2 Wi-Fi mesh: nodes look like a single Ethernet to the user, kernel routes frames optimally.
why: Community Wi-Fi networks (Freifunk, guifi.net) — link many rooftop radios into one big LAN.
tradeoffs: Wi-Fi range. Layer-2 flooding scales poorly past hundreds of nodes. No native encryption.
